allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Districts with forecast: {sum\(1 for x in d if x[\\"forecast\\"]\)} / {len\(d\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Districts:', len\(d['districts']\), '| Avg temp:', d['summary']['avgTemp']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=d['summary']; print\(f'  Avg temp: {s[\\"avgTemp\\"]}°C | Rainy: {s[\\"rainyDistricts\\"]} | Alerts: {s[\\"activeAlerts\\"]} | Districts: {len\(d[\\"districts\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); has=sum\(1 for x in d if x['forecast']\); print\(f'  {has}/{len\(d\)} districts have forecast data'\)")
